ideation: This animation sequence simulates the action of placing a bookmark into a book.  The robot will use its right arm to gently place an imaginary bookmark. The left arm will remain largely neutral. Frame 1 begins with both arms at rest.  In frame 2, the right arm moves forward and upward, slightly curving to mimic the act of inserting a bookmark. In frame 3, the right arm straightens slightly, and the wrist rotates to complete the act of inserting the bookmark. The final frame shows the right arm returning to a relaxed position, while the left arm remains largely unchanged throughout the sequence.  The overall animation should convey a sense of careful placement.

frames.beat: arms rest at sides, ready for a book
right arm reaches forward, lifting the bookmark
gently placing the bookmark with a slight wrist turn
right arm returns to rest, task complete
